code: import React,{useCallback}from'react';import{useLocation,useHistory}from'react-router-dom';import classNames from'classnames';import'./Categories.scss';export var Categories=function Categories(){var location=useLocation();var history=useHistory();var searchParams=new URLSearchParams(location.search);var category=searchParams.get('category');var categoryListFirst=['Sports','World','Business','Entertainment'];var categoryListSecond=['Science','Health','Nation','Technology'];var handleClick=useCallback(function(item){searchParams.set('category',"".concat(item.toLowerCase()));history.push("?".concat(searchParams));},[searchParams,history]);return/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div",{className:"Categories"},/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("ul",{className:"Categories-categoryList list"},categoryListFirst.map(function(item){return/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("li",{className:"Categories-Item",key:item},/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("button",{type:"button",className:classNames('Categories-Link',{is_active:item.toLowerCase()===category}),onClick:function onClick(){return handleClick(item);}},item));})),/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("ul",{className:"Categories-categoryListSecond list"},categoryListSecond.map(function(item){return/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("li",{className:"Categories-Item",key:item},/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("button",{type:"button",className:classNames('Categories-Link',{is_active:item.toLowerCase()===category}),onClick:function onClick(){return handleClick(item);}},item));})));};
